# WeBearish — Autism Resource Hub

## About
WeBearish.com is a comprehensive autism resource hub for parents, caregivers, autistic individuals, and educators. We provide evidence-based, community-informed content about autism diagnosis, therapies, sensory needs, IEPs, neurodiversity, and living well across all ages.

## Topics
- Autism diagnosis (for children, teens, adults)
- Sensory processing and sensory tools
- IEP and school accommodations
- ABA therapy and alternative therapies
- Neurodiversity and autism acceptance
- Autistic burnout and mental health
- Autism in girls and women
- Late autism diagnosis in adults
- Communication (AAC, echolalia)
- Parenting autistic children
- Autism and anxiety, sleep, food
- Community and support resources
- Autism by age (toddler through adult)
- Safety and crisis resources

## Tier 1 Deep Sub-Pages

### Autism & Anxiety
- https://webearish.com/autism-and-anxiety/types : Types of Anxiety in Autistic Children
- https://webearish.com/autism-and-anxiety/coping : Coping Strategies That Actually Work
- https://webearish.com/autism-and-anxiety/when-to-seek-help : When to Seek Help for Anxiety
- https://webearish.com/autism-and-anxiety/at-school : Managing Anxiety at School
- https://webearish.com/autism-and-anxiety/at-home : Creating a Low-Anxiety Home

### Sleep Guide
- https://webearish.com/autism-sleep-guide/environment : Building the Perfect Sleep Environment
- https://webearish.com/autism-sleep-guide/routines : Bedtime Routines That Work
- https://webearish.com/autism-sleep-guide/melatonin : The Melatonin Guide for Parents
- https://webearish.com/autism-sleep-guide/sensory-tools : Sensory Sleep Tools
- https://webearish.com/autism-sleep-guide/by-age : Sleep Strategies by Age

### Social Skills
- https://webearish.com/autism-social-skills/making-friends : Making Friends as an Autistic Child
- https://webearish.com/autism-social-skills/playground : Navigating the Playground

- https://webearish.com/autism-social-skills/online : Online Socializing and Gaming
- https://webearish.com/autism-social-skills/scripts : Social Scripts and When They Help

### Nonverbal Autism
